questionHtml: Ethyne, like ethene, undergoes hydrogenation to form ethane. State the conditions required.
markschemeHtml:
nickel/Ni «catalyst»

 

high pressure

OR

heat

 

Accept these other catalysts: Pt, Pd, Ir, Rh, Co, Ti.

Accept “high temperature” or a stated temperature such as “150 °C”.

[2 marks]

meta.title: Ethyne, like ethene, undergoes hydrogenation to form ethane. State the conditions required.
